scripts.build:all: npm run build:balloon && npm run build:chef && npm run build:runner && npm run build:mouth-catch && npm run build:dino
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix games/balloon-pop-adventure ci && npm --prefix games/gesture-chef ci && npm --prefix games/gesture-runner ci && npm --prefix games/mouth-open-catch ci && npm --prefix games/dino-runner ci
scripts.build:netlify: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
